description_long: This object is a short, double-edged knife or dagger with a broad, leaf-shaped blade featuring intricate, swirling engravings along its surface. The blade is metallic, with a silvery-gray finish and a central cutout that adds to its decorative and functional appeal. The handle is wrapped in a vivid blue material, likely fabric or leather, providing a textured grip and visual contrast to the blade. The handle ends with a metallic cap, and the transition between blade and handle is marked by a geometric, angular design. The overall construction suggests a blend of utility and ornamental craftsmanship, suitable for display or ceremonial use as well as practical application. The object is compact and robust, with a design that emphasizes both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A short, double-edged knife with a broad, engraved blade and a blue-wrapped handle, featuring ornate metallic detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the engraved blade and the blue-wrapped handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade engravings and handle wrap seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the width of the blade and the geometric handle cap.
attribute_blade_type: double-edged, straight, leaf-shaped blade with central cutout
attribute_handle_design: straight handle, blue fabric or leather wrap, metallic end cap, geometric accents
